Query.SQL: SELECT ${param.judgmentId} AS "JUDGMENT_ID" , CASE_NUMBER AS "CASE_NUMBER" , STD_EVENT_ID AS "STD_EVENT_ID" , EVENT_SEQ AS "EVENT_SEQ" FROM CASE_EVENTS WHERE EVENT_SEQ = (SELECT MAX(CE.EVENT_SEQ) FROM CASE_EVENTS CE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CE.CASE_PARTY_NO = ${param.casePartyNumber} AND CE.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = ${param.casePartyRole} AND CE.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID in (230, 240) )
